_readme: RFP Analyzer - Application Settings Template. Copy to appsettings.Development.json and replace placeholder values. Authentication uses Azure DefaultAzureCredential everywhere (no API keys). Locally: run 'az login'. In Azure: uses Managed Identity. Required RBAC roles: 'Azure AI Developer' on OpenAI/AI Foundry, 'Cognitive Services User' on Content Understanding and Document Intelligence resources.
_azure_openai_comment: Azure OpenAI / AI Foundry endpoint URL and model deployment name (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4.1, gpt-5.2)
_content_understanding_comment: Azure Content Understanding endpoint for document extraction
_document_intelligence_comment: Azure Document Intelligence endpoint (alternative extraction service)
_azure_client_id_comment: User-assigned managed identity client ID (optional, leave empty for system-assigned or local dev)
_app_insights_comment: Application Insights connection string (optional, set automatically by 'azd up' in production)
